name: simplegrid-website
description: Static SimpleGrid.ai marketing site. Run `npm run build` before pushing to deploy: it pre-transpiles all JSX so production stops shipping Babel-standalone (3 MB) on every page.

scripts.build: babel components/ --out-dir components/ --presets=@babel/preset-react --extensions .jsx --out-file-extension .js && babel app/ --out-dir app/ --presets=@babel/preset-react --extensions .jsx --out-file-extension .js && node scripts/swap-jsx-to-js-in-html.js
